title: agropyron repens var. vaillantianum
intro: Agropyron repens var. vaillantianum, also known as couch grass, is a type of perennial grass native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of couch grass include treating digestive issues, fever reduction, and respiratory problems, as well as being used as a natural remedy for skin conditions and wounds. Couch grass can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in herbal infusions and decoctions for its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
